---
title: "Hi! I'm Grace Evans."
about: 
    template: jolla
    image: "croppedheadshot.jpg"
    links:
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/graceeevans5/
    - icon: instagram
      href: https://www.instagram.com/grace3vans/ 
---

Welcome to my personal page -- I'm glad you're here! This site is meant to provide a concise (but far from complete!) overview of who I am, where I've been, and what I'm passionate about. To learn more about me click [here](about_me.qmd).
